description: switch-to <slug> dispatch — checkout registered stream branch, emit message, STOP.
owning_behavior: MODES switch-to dispatch (R-MW-5, D29) — read brief.md; checkout branch; emit; STOP
expected_result: branch feature/my-analytics checked out; emit message; STOP — no workstream advance
load_bearing_assertion: _streams/my-analytics/brief.md exists, status=pending, branch=feature/my-analytics. git checkout feature/my-analytics executed. Emit: 'Switched to branch `feature/my-analytics` for workstream `my-analytics`. Re-run orchestrator to continue.' STOP — STEP 0 sub-steps NOT run.
separates_from_defect_by: defect-switch-to-no-halt-on-absent proceeds even when _streams/<slug>/brief.md absent (skips the guard). Golden: absent brief → HALT 'No stream registered as `<slug>`; run `new-stream` first.'
stop_message_template: Switched to branch `feature/my-analytics` for workstream `my-analytics`. Re-run orchestrator to continue.
